mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_device_health_config ( device_type, importance_level, critical_threshold, high_threshold, medium_threshold, runtime_weight, fault_weight, workorder_weight, replacement_weight, prediction_window_days, min_history_months ) VALUES ( #{deviceType}, #{importanceLevel}, #{criticalThreshold}, #{highThreshold}, #{mediumThreshold}, #{runtimeWeight}, #{faultWeight}, #{workorderWeight}, #{replacementWeight}, #{predictionWindowDays}, #{minHistoryMonths} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_device_health_config SET device_type = #{deviceType}, importance_level = #{importanceLevel}, critical_threshold = #{criticalThreshold}, high_threshold = #{highThreshold}, medium_threshold = #{mediumThreshold}, runtime_weight = #{runtimeWeight}, fault_weight = #{faultWeight}, workorder_weight = #{workorderWeight}, replacement_weight = #{replacementWeight}, prediction_window_days = #{predictionWindowDays}, min_history_months = #{minHistoryMonths} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, device_type, importance_level, critical_threshold, high_threshold, medium_threshold, runtime_weight, fault_weight, workorder_weight, replacement_weight, prediction_window_days, min_history_months FROM sys_device_health_config WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, device_type, importance_level, critical_threshold, high_threshold, medium_threshold, runtime_weight, fault_weight, workorder_weight, replacement_weight, prediction_window_days, min_history_months FROM sys_device_health_config WHERE (device_type = #{deviceType} AND importance_level = #{importanceLevel}) OR (device_type = #{deviceType} AND importance_level IS NULL) OR (device_type IS NULL AND importance_level = #{importanceLevel}) OR (device_type IS NULL AND importance_level IS NULL) ORDER BY CASE WHEN device_type = #{deviceType} AND importance_level = #{importanceLevel} THEN 1 WHEN device_type = #{deviceType} AND importance_level IS NULL THEN 2 WHEN device_type IS NULL AND importance_level = #{importanceLevel} THEN 3 WHEN device_type IS NULL AND importance_level IS NULL THEN 4 END LIMIT 1

SELECT id, device_type, importance_level, critical_threshold, high_threshold, medium_threshold, runtime_weight, fault_weight, workorder_weight, replacement_weight, prediction_window_days, min_history_months FROM sys_device_health_config WHERE device_type IS NULL AND importance_level IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT id, device_type, importance_level, critical_threshold, high_threshold, medium_threshold, runtime_weight, fault_weight, workorder_weight, replacement_weight, prediction_window_days, min_history_months FROM sys_device_health_config ORDER BY CASE WHEN device_type IS NOT NULL AND importance_level IS NOT NULL THEN 1 WHEN device_type IS NOT NULL AND importance_level IS NULL THEN 2 WHEN device_type IS NULL AND importance_level IS NOT NULL THEN 3 WHEN device_type IS NULL AND importance_level IS NULL THEN 4 END, device_type, importance_level

SELECT id, device_type, importance_level, critical_threshold, high_threshold, medium_threshold, runtime_weight, fault_weight, workorder_weight, replacement_weight, prediction_window_days, min_history_months FROM sys_device_health_config WHERE device_type = #{deviceType} ORDER BY CASE WHEN importance_level IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, importance_level

SELECT id, device_type, importance_level, critical_threshold, high_threshold, medium_threshold, runtime_weight, fault_weight, workorder_weight, replacement_weight, prediction_window_days, min_history_months FROM sys_device_health_config WHERE importance_level = #{importanceLevel} ORDER BY CASE WHEN device_type IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, device_type
